ab: lséli ka kukui, vlakɨ ni drukay zuku kini.
ch: 我的好朋友叫kukui，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is kukui, and he is also an Rukai child.

ch: 我們一起在茂林魯凱讀書。
en: We study together in the Teldreka tribe.

ab: sitalsɨ kɨnamɨ biciringi maurudrenge tububuru urugu kɨname téldrɨdrɨkane.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說魯凱語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Rukai proficiently.

ab: maragre si lakucuru kɨkɨ, kukui ka tikca si lakerɨlé.
ch: 我很高也很胖，kukui很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while kukui is short and thin.

ab: sakura kcɨngna ki kukui, rsamania mdalme ico.
ch: kukui很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: kukui is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
